name: Seed Delivery Servo Mission
description: You are an agricultural technician programming a drone for targeted cover crop seeding. The drone uses a servo-actuated seed hopper to drop seeds at specific locations. Using the parameters (coordinates, servo channel, PWM values, and wait times) found in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/delivery_spec.txt, create a mission plan in QGroundControl that includes a takeoff, navigation to both delivery locations with the required servo and wait commands for seed dispersal at each, and a Return to Launch (RTL) command. Save the completed mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/seed_delivery.plan. You do not need to arm or fly the vehicle; only create and save the plan file.
